items.title: Spot Prices Wrap: Physical Natural Gas Prices Edge Higher as Cold Hits Northeast
items.summary: Spot gas prices fell at most hubs Thursday as warmer-than-normal conditions from the Plains to the Mid-Atlantic sapped heating demand, though the overall trend was modestly higher on the back of a surge in New England prices.

items.title: Futures Settle: Natural Gas Rallies Back Above $3 on War Risk, Bullish Storage Draw
items.summary: Natural gas futures rose Thursday as a larger-than-expected storage withdrawal and rising geopolitical risks in the Middle East outweighed winterÆs fading impact on heating demand.

items.title: Northeast Asia Cold Boosts LNG Demand Amid EuropeÆs Mild March Outlook
items.summary: The outlook for a brief cold spell in Northeast Asia could help continue to pull U.S. LNG cargoes to the Pacific as springlike weather settles over Europe.

items.title: MexicoÆs Natural Gas Imports Hit New Highs Despite Global Market Turmoil
items.summary: MexicoÆs imports of U.S. natural gas continued to rise in March as the countryÆs end users saw no noticeable change despite a war raging in the Middle East.

items.title: MidDay Snapshot: Natural Gas Cash Pricing Subdued Amid Nationwide Thawing
items.summary: The day-ahead spot natural gas market saw muted price action on Thursday as traders assessed a stout inventory withdrawal, exceptionally mild weather, and ongoing turmoil in the Middle East.

items.title: U.S. Summer, Winter Natural Gas Forward Prices Jump as Call for LNG Strengthens Amid Mideast War
items.summary: An open-ended conflict in the Middle East that has spread to a dozen countries and stifled energy production there has pushed U.S. natural gas prices for this summer and even next winter higher as the market weighs how strong LNG demand could impact

items.title: Tourmaline Cuts Capex as Weak AECO Prices Persist, Eyes Global LNG Upside
items.summary: CanadaÆs top natural gas producer Tourmaline Oil Corp. is playing a calculated waiting game, deferring some spending until Western Canadian benchmarks recover, even as it eyes ōwindfallö profits from volatile global markets, management said.

items.title: Sempra Axes Vista Pacifico LNG Plan, Cutting MexicoÆs Proposed Export Capacity
items.summary: MexicoÆs potential LNG export buildout has shrunk by about 0.5 Bcf/d after Sempra ended development plans for its long-proposed Vista Pacifico project.

items.title: MidDay Futures: Natural Gas Market Unmoved by Bullish Storage Surprise
items.summary: ThursdayÆs U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) storage report confirmed a steeper withdrawal than survey averages predicted, but sinking demand on springlike weather prevented futures from rallying.

items.title: Midmorning Markets: Natural Gas Storage Deficit Widens, Supporting Futures

items.title: Why Qatar's LNG Halt Won't Trigger a Long-Term Global Price Spiral

items.title: Ecopetrol Eyes Oil Output Boost As Iran Crisis Pushes Up Prices
